nodes.label: Default Album Artwork Placeholder (Vinyl Disc)
nodes.depicts: Stylized silhouette of a vinyl record / CD disc centered on a square canvas: a large dark-gray circular disc with a smaller concentric ring and a tiny center spindle hole
nodes.style: Minimal flat monochrome silhouette icon, low-contrast, no text or logo, symmetric concentric geometry, subtle tonal separation between disc and background
nodes.purpose: Fallback placeholder artwork shown when a track has no album art available in the DJ bridge UI
